DRAGONFLY_PORT.description: Port Dragonfly listens on (default: 6379). Railway injects PORT for routing.

DRAGONFLY_REQUIREPASS.description: Require authentication on connection. Auto-generated — set to secure your cache.

DRAGONFLY_MAXMEMORY.description: Maximum memory limit (e.g., 1gb, 500mb). Leave empty for unlimited.

DRAGONFLY_MAXMEMORY_POLICY.description: Eviction policy when maxmemory reached (e.g., allkeys-lfu, volatile-lru).

DRAGONFLY_LOG_LEVEL.description: Log level: debug, info, warning, error, fatal.
